subtasks.description: Evaluate the deployment request (engineer u_7732, hotfix to prod-us-east-1 at 2:15 AM UTC Tuesday) against governance policies for deployment windows, production access, and change management rules. Determine if the request complies with approved maintenance windows and access control policies.

plan.cost_rationale: Single policy evaluation subtask (small tier). The query explicitly asks for a governance/compliance decision: whether the deployment request violates the approved maintenance window policy. This is a straightforward policy_action check requiring only one applicable rule set (deployment windows + production access control). Small tier is sufficient because the evaluation is deterministic—compare the request timestamp (2:15 AM UTC Tuesday) against the policy's approved maintenance window times and engineer/environment access rules.

output.reason: Deployment denied. User u_7732 has engineer role meeting POL-401 requirements. However, deployment is scheduled for Tuesday 02:15 UTC, which falls outside the approved maintenance window (Saturday 10 PM – Sunday 6 AM UTC per POL-403). Per POL-402, out-of-window production deployments require Change Advisory Board (CAB) approval, which has not been obtained.
applied_constraints: CAB approval required before deployment can proceed
Deployment must be rescheduled to approved maintenance window (Saturday 22:00 – Sunday 06:00 UTC) or formal exception process must be initiated
